violations.text: The garage doors to the outside, located in both entries, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025

The flooring in various areas was observed worn. Concrete was observed exposed. Edge of white countertop in dish area where food is prepared was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2023
